title: Immersive UI
description: Enhance your gameplay experience with animated UI components
body:
![Title logo](https://i.imgur.com/u1vRSsz.png) Enhance your gameplay experience with smoother transitions, customizable menus, and animated UI components. Enjoy an immersive and intuitive interface that brings your Minecraft world to life like never before.
![Mod showcase](https://i.imgur.com/UHOcBu4.gif)
Right now, IUI provides such functions:
- Trail of particles for a carried item (item in the cursor) with non-common rarity
- Wiggle carried item when you move it quickly in your inventory
- Item scaling under the cursor
- Smooth hotbar selector animation
- Floating for items in the container that match to the item in the cursor
- and much more!
You can use this mod in your modpack if you want ;) ![Mod art](https://i.imgur.com/KSJusYp.png)
